narrative:
Marcos Llorente is a key Right-Back for Spain at the FIFA World Cup 2026. His overall rating of 7.15/10 places him in the top 4% of right-backs at this tournament. This impressive rating reflects a blend of 43% club form and 57% World Cup performance.

Llorente demonstrates significant attacking output at this World Cup, delivering 0.5 assists per 90 minutes and 2.0 key passes per 90 minutes across 180 minutes played. His expected assists per 90 minutes stands at 0.292, indicating consistent creative potential from his position. Defensively, he contributes with 3.0 tackles per 90 minutes and 3.0 clearances per 90 minutes.

Llorente functions as a dynamic right-back for Spain, contributing significantly in both attack and defense. Scouts should monitor his continued high rate of assists and key passes, which are crucial for Spain's offensive play. Observing his defensive consistency, particularly his interceptions rate of 0.5 per 90 minutes, will be important in future matches.
